taskSummary: Remediate workflow/code-style docs and fix concrete violations in src/modules/reference-patterns so the module genuinely exemplifies its own rules.

acceptanceCriteria: All identified doc gaps (helpers naming, sub-component extraction, interface splitting, type export visibility, module-level shared types, container/hook sectioning, constants-in-types prohibition, lib one-export-per-file, shared API resource foldering, plan-mirror path wording) are addressed in the relevant doc/rule files.

All identified code violations in src/modules/reference-patterns/** are remediated: scalar useImmer state shape, deep imports bypassing leaf public API, schema-derived type/constant placement, constants found in types.ts, import ordering, and structural extractions.
Typecheck, lint, and tests all pass after remediation.
Runtime on port 4000 shows no regressions on reference-patterns routes.
constraints: Honor the canonical mirror path src/tmp/PLAN.md for the session plan.
Repo docs still reference tmp/PLAN.md; that wording will be updated during implementation (todo A10).
Do not stop services on port 3000.

plan.summary: Two sequential tracks: (A) tighten docs/rules in AGENTS.md, CODE_STYLE_GUIDES.md, copilot-instructions.md, prompts, and skills; then (B) fix concrete code violations in src/modules/reference-patterns/**. Quality gates run after both tracks. Plan mirror lives at src/tmp/PLAN.md.

qualityGates.lastRunSummary: check-types ✅ | lint ✅ | test ✅ | build ✅ | build:storybook ✅ | test:coverage ✅ — Coverage: stmts=83.6%, branches=76.5%, fns=87.3%, lines=83.6%, all above thresholds (80%/75%/80%/80%).

caveats: No manual browser/runtime verification was performed against port 4000 (or any running dev server). The acceptance criterion 'Runtime on port 4000 shows no regressions on reference-patterns routes' is NOT verified by automated checks alone. A human reviewer should start the dev server and exercise the /reference-patterns/galactic-archive route before merging.
All modified files are staged as working-tree changes on branch feat/revise-agent-files but have not been committed yet in this session.
delivery.notes: All six automated quality gates are green. Implementation tracks A (docs/rules) and B (code violations) are both complete. Plan mirror is confirmed at src/tmp/PLAN.md (gitignored). No stale PLAND.md or root-level tmp/PLAN.md references remain in any workflow artifact.
